description: Table of contents or meeting agenda slide with a full-width body area for listing sections or agenda items.
usage: Use after the cover slide to preview the structure of the presentation. List 3–6 agenda items or sections.
potential_usage: Can appear at the start of each major section as a 'where we are' recap slide.

placeholder_summary.TITLE_0: Main slide title — states the key message or topic
placeholder_summary.BODY_11: Subtitle, date, presenter name, or event description
placeholder_summary.SLIDE_NUMBER_10: Auto-generated slide number footer (do not edit)
placeholder_summary.BODY_12: Main content area — bullets, paragraphs, or structured content
placeholder_summary.BODY_13: Main content area — bullets, paragraphs, or structured content
placeholder_summary.BODY_14: Main content area — bullets, paragraphs, or structured content
placeholder_summary.BODY_15: Main content area — bullets, paragraphs, or structured content
placeholder_summary.BODY_16: Main content area — bullets, paragraphs, or structured content
placeholder_summary.BODY_17: Main content area — bullets, paragraphs, or structured content

content_suggestions.TITLE_0: Slide title (3–8 words describing Agenda / TOC)
content_suggestions.BODY_11: Subtitle text, date, or event name (1–2 lines)
